titleStmt.title: SII 23.403: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 403. (A.R. No. 403 of 1907.) Peruṅgaruṇai, Mudukulattur Taluk, Ramnad District Paṭṭābhirāmasvāmi temple—on the west and south walls Śaka 1481, Siddhārthi, Āṉi [14], Monday śu. 7, Uttiram: A.D. 1559, June 12

summary.p: This records the alienation of two villages Śiruguḍi (forming a part of Peruṅgaruṇai) alias Tiruvāḷanallūr and Maḍaikkaḻi belonging as the tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam of god Aḻagar in favour of the temple of Nayinār Peruṅgaruṇai-Perumāḷ as the presentation from the former.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ—cakābdam 1000 4 100 8 10 1- ṉ meṟcellā niṉṟa siddhārtthi varuṣam Āṉi mātam [10 4] tiyati somavāramum pūrvapakṣattu saptamiyum variyāṉayoga mum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam Aḻakar tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam śrī peruṅkaruṇaiccaturvedimamkalattu nayiṉār rāmacandran Āṉa
nayiṉār peruṅkaruṇaipperumāḷukku svāmi Aḻakar tirukkaivaḻakkamākat tiruvuḷam vāḻntaruḷi naṭantu vanta Ūr peruṅkaruṇaippaṟṟu ciṟukuṭi Āṉa tiruvāḷanallūrum maṭaikaḻiyum perunāṉkellaiyum ma dharmmam Ākak kaṭamai paḷavari kaḻittu sarva
mānnyam Āka naṭakka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭiye Ācandrārkavat ssādhanamākkavum Itukku Ahitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ gaṅgaikkaraiyile guruvaiyum mātā pitāvaiyum kārāmpacuvaiyum brāhmaṇaṉaiyum koṉṟa pāvattai Aṉubhavippaāṉ
Digital edition of SII 23.403 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
